zh.West Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Bramshott於大約1446年出生在英國哈普爾時，她的父親John Bramshot23歲，母親Katherine Pelham19歲。她於大約1465年與Sir John Pakenham在英國波克夏結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年9月6日在英國素可享年40歲。

zh-hans.West Sussex, England: 英国英格兰韋斯特 素可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Bramshott于大约1446年出生在英国哈普爾时，她的父亲John Bramshot23岁，母亲Katherine Pelham19岁。她于大约1465年与Sir John Pakenham在英国波克夏结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年9月6日在英国素可享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Bramshott was born about 1446, in Hampshire, England, her father, John Bramshot, was 23 and her mother, Katherine Pelham, was 19. She married Sir John Pakenham about 1465, in Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 6 September 1485, in Sussex, England, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Bramshott est née environ 1446, à Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, John Bramshot, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Katherine Pelham, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Pakenham environ 1465, à Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 septembre 1485, à Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Bramshott um 1446 in Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Bramshot 23 und ihre Mutter Katherine Pelham 19. Sie hat um 1465 in Berkshire, England Sir John Pakenham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. September 1485 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bramshott è nata il circa 1446 nel Hampshire, England, sua padre, John Bramshot, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Katherine Pelham, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Pakenham circa 1465, nel Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 settembre 1485, nel Sussex, England, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.West Sussex, England: イギリスイギリスウエスト スセックス
ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Bramshottが約1446年にイギリスハンプシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Bramshotは23歳，母Katherine Pelhamは19歳であった。約1465年にイギリスバークシュアイアでSir John Pakenhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年9月6日にイギリススセックスで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Bramshott(이)가 대략 1446년 영국 함프실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Bramshot(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Pelham(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1465년 영국 버크실르에서 Sir John Pakenham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 9월 6일 영국 수세스에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.West Sussex, England: West Sussex, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bramshott nasceu aproximadamente 1446, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Bramshot, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Pelham, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Pakenham aproximadamente 1465, em Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de setembro de 1485, em Sussex, Inglaterra, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Bramshott родилась около 1446 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Bramshot было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Pelham, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Pakenham около 1465 г. в местности биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 6 сентября 1485 г. в местности суссекс, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Bramshott nació aproximadamente 1446, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Bramshot, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Katherine Pelham, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Sir John Pakenham aproximadamente 1465, en Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de septiembre de 1485, en Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 40 años.
